ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the season started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the season ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  "playoff_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the season included playoffs */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship during the season */,
  "num_teams_participated" INTEGER /* Number of teams that participated in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., NL, AL) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., East, Central, West) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_code" TEXT /* Code representing the position (e.g., 1B, 2B) */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., First Base, Second Base) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "position_type" TEXT /* Type of position (e.g., Infield, Outfield, Pitcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position the player plays */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player (e.g., Left, Right, Switch) */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand of the player (e.g., Left, Right) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that drafted the player */,
  "contract_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the current contract started */,
  "contract_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the current contract ends */,
  "salary" REAL /* Player's current salary */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_draft_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome (e.g., Impossible, Remote, Unlikely, Even, Likely, Routine) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "probability_range_low" REAL /* Lower bound of the probability range for the outcome */,
  "probability_range_high" REAL /* Upper bound of the probability range for the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position played */,
  "innings" REAL /* Number of innings played */,
  "outcome_1_count" INTEGER /* Count of plays resulting in the 'Impossible' outcome */,
  "outcome_2_count" INTEGER /* Count of plays resulting in the 'Remote' outcome */,
  "outcome_3_count" INTEGER /* Count of plays resulting in the 'Unlikely' outcome */,
  "outcome_4_count" INTEGER /* Count of plays resulting in the 'Even' outcome */,
  "outcome_5_count" INTEGER /* Count of plays resulting in the 'Likely' outcome */,
  "outcome_6_count" INTEGER /* Count of plays resulting in the 'Routine' outcome */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games the player participated in */,
  "total_bases" INTEGER /* Total bases achieved by the player */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs hit by the player */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in by the player */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases by the player */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Number of times the player was caught stealing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_records_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_records_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_records_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_probabilities" (
  "probability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each probability record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record */,
  "outcome_1_prob" REAL /* Probability of the 'Impossible' outcome */,
  "outcome_2_prob" REAL /* Probability of the 'Remote' outcome */,
  "outcome_3_prob" REAL /* Probability of the 'Unlikely' outcome */,
  "outcome_4_prob" REAL /* Probability of the 'Even' outcome */,
  "outcome_5_prob" REAL /* Probability of the 'Likely' outcome */,
  "outcome_6_prob" REAL /* Probability of the 'Routine' outcome */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the probability record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the probability record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("probability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_probabilities_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES performance_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_performance_probabilities" (
  "total_probability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total probability record */,
  "total_record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the total performance record */,
  "outcome_1_prob" REAL /* Probability of the 'Impossible' outcome */,
  "outcome_2_prob" REAL /* Probability of the 'Remote' outcome */,
  "outcome_3_prob" REAL /* Probability of the 'Unlikely' outcome */,
  "outcome_4_prob" REAL /* Probability of the 'Even' outcome */,
  "outcome_5_prob" REAL /* Probability of the 'Likely' outcome */,
  "outcome_6_prob" REAL /* Probability of the 'Routine' outcome */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the total probability record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the total probability record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_probability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Scout, Analyst, Admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "can_view_player_data" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the role can view player data */,
  "can_edit_player_data" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the role can edit player data */,
  "can_view_team_data" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the role can view team data */,
  "can_edit_team_data" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the role can edit team data */,
  "can_view_performance_data" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the role can view performance data */,
  "can_edit_performance_data" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the role can edit performance data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Batting Average, Fielding Percentage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., Offensive, Defensive, Pitching) */,
  "is_primary_metric" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the metric is a primary metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_metrics" (
  "player_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player metric record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_metrics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record accessed */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES player_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES performance_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
